title: elatostema lineolatum var. lineolatum
intro: Elatostema lineolatum var. lineolatum, also known as the lined waterwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Southeast Asia and China, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and improving skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the lined waterwort are often used to make tea, decoctions, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
